title: Three-Quarters Cover
excerpt: Three-quarters cover provides substantial protection when an obstacle screens at least three-quarters of a target's body.
markdown:
# Three-Quarters Cover

Three-quarters cover represents significant physical screening by an intervening obstacle. It offers substantial protection against direct attacks and spatial hazards, leaving only a small portion of the target exposed.

## Environmental Context

A target has three-quarters cover if an obstacle blocks at least three-quarters of its physical form from the source of an attack or effect. Examples include a portcullis, an arrow slit, a substantial boulder, or a thick castle wall screen.

## Tactical Protection

- provides a +5 bonus to [[armor_class|Armor Class (AC)]]
- provides a +5 bonus to [[dexterity]] saving throws

## Targeting Dynamics

While the target remains visible and directly targetable, the narrow window of exposure makes landing a successful hit or affecting the target extremely challenging. It represents the final tier of partial exposure before transitioning into [[total_cover]].
